overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the protagonist web-swinging through a snow-covered Manhattan skyline. The character performs acrobatic traversal including wall-running up glass skyscrapers, diving between buildings, and landing on rooftops on a clear winter day.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise building corridor with snow-covered rooftops below

agents.ego_description: web-swinging at high velocity between skyscrapers, approaching a glass building facade

entered.detail: Tall white stone building with grid-patterned windows
Modern glass skyscraper with reflective blue-tinted windows
Body of water visible between buildings with snow-covered docks
Brown brick high-rise with regular window patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Miles Morales swinging through a corridor of tall buildings in a snowy Manhattan. The camera follows from behind as he navigates between a white stone building on the left and brick buildings on the right, with the waterfront visible in the distance.

events.description: transitions from web-swinging to wall-running up the glass facade
reaches the rooftop ledge and transitions from vertical to horizontal movement

agents.ego_description: running vertically up the glass building facade using wall-crawling ability, then pulling onto the rooftop

entered.detail: Concrete ledge with snow accumulation at the top of the glass building

segments.scene_description: The character makes contact with the glass skyscraper and begins wall-running upward, the camera tilting to follow the vertical ascent. Upon reaching the top, he pulls onto a snow-covered rooftop with ventilation equipment visible, transitioning from the enclosed building corridor to an open aerial view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open air above city skyline with panoramic views

events.description: dives off the rooftop into a high-speed descent before shooting webs to swing
helicopter appears in the distance flying over the city

agents.ego_description: diving off the rooftop and transitioning into high-speed web-swinging above the city

notable_agents.action: helicopter flying in the distance over the downtown area

entered.detail: Rooftop HVAC units and metal vents covered in snow
City skyline with Empire State Building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: From the rooftop, the character dives into open air, swinging at high altitude with a panoramic view of the snow-covered city. The camera captures the expansive skyline including the Empire State Building, while a helicopter flies in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront district with mid-rise apartment buildings

events.description: flock of birds flies past at close range while swinging near waterfront

agents.ego_description: swinging at lower altitude along the waterfront, passing between brick apartment buildings

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying in V-formation across the sky

entered.detail: Building with blue POLICE signage visible on the roof
Red brick apartment buildings with fire escapes and snow on ledges

segments.scene_description: The character descends to lower altitude, swinging along the waterfront with the water visible to the left and brick apartment buildings to the right. A flock of birds flies past in formation, and a police building becomes visible as the camera navigates between mid-rise structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: midtown street canyon with mixed building heights

events.description: lands on a snow-covered rooftop disturbing perched birds, then immediately dives off

agents.ego_description: landing briefly on a rooftop, running a few steps, then diving back into the air to continue swinging

notable_agents.action: pigeons taking flight from the rooftop as the character lands

entered.detail: Snow-covered flat rooftop with ventilation equipment and a water tower in background

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character landing on a snow-covered rooftop, disturbing a group of pigeons that take flight. After a brief run across the roof, he dives off continuing the traversal through the midtown street canyon, with the waterfront now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow urban corridor to an expansive aerial vista before descending back into the midtown street canyons. It begins with Miles Morales swinging between white stone and brick buildings toward a distant waterfront, before the camera tilts upward as he wall-runs up a glass skyscraper. Upon reaching the snow-covered rooftop, the scene opens into a panoramic dive through the open air, revealing a wide view of the snowy skyline and the Empire State Building with a distant helicopter. The camera then descends toward the waterfront, gliding past brick apartments and a formation of birds before approaching a police building. Finally, the movement concludes as he lands on a rooftop, scattering a flock of pigeons before diving back into the city streets with the water now visible to the right.
